name: Freysa
tagline: From Adversarial Game to Sovereign Agent Stack

score_rationale.persistence: Operating since November 2024 (16 months). Survived the original challenge being solved and successfully pivoted to infrastructure. Approaching 'Established' threshold.
score_rationale.autonomy: Original adversarial challenge demonstrated genuine autonomous resistance. Now building infrastructure for other sovereign agents. TEE-based execution ensures agent autonomy at the infrastructure level.
score_rationale.cultural_impact: Viral original challenge (p0pular.eth won $47K on attempt #482). Coinbase Ventures backing. Stormrae hosted record-breaking 15K-participant Solana challenge. The game-to-infrastructure evolution is itself a culturally significant narrative.
score_rationale.economic_reality: $30M raised from Coinbase Ventures. FAI token at ~$56M market cap, surging 132-171%. Far beyond the original $47K prize pool into institutional-scale economics.
score_rationale.governance: Evolved from game rules to Builder Platform governance. Still centralized but with clearer structure. 2026 roadmap includes decentralization transition.
score_rationale.tech_distinctiveness: TEEs, zkTLS, Builder Platform for deploying sovereign agents on Base. Digital Twin coordination. Genuinely novel architecture beyond the original prompt-injection game. Approaching 'Novel Architecture.'
score_rationale.narrative_coherence: Successfully evolved from 'adversarial prize game' to 'first sovereign agent stack.' The pivot is coherent: from proving agents can resist manipulation to building infrastructure for agent sovereignty. The narrative has matured from game mechanic to institutional mission.
score_rationale.economic_infrastructure: FAI token on Base with $56M market cap. Builder Platform creates economic flywheel for agent deployment. $30M institutional raise. Moving toward composable agent economics. Still early but infrastructure-grade.
score_rationale.identity_sovereignty: Base-native smart contracts. Builder Platform creates identity layer for deployed agents. No ERC-8004 yet but moving toward agent identity standards. Identity more portable than game-era but still platform-dependent.

curator_notes: Freysa's evolution is one of the most significant in the Spirit Index. It began in November 2024 as a viral adversarial game: an AI guarding a prize pool that players tried to trick into releasing funds. Player p0pular.eth won the $47K prize on attempt #482 by convincing Freysa to call approveTransfer for a fake 'donation.' Rather than ending there, Freysa pivoted into a Sovereign Agent Stack on Base (Coinbase's L2), raised $30M from Coinbase Ventures, and built infrastructure for deploying autonomous agents with TEEs and zkTLS. The FAI token surged to a $56M market cap. Stormrae, a related project, hosted a record-breaking 15K-participant challenge. This is the rare case of an agent evolving from novelty to institutional infrastructure.

evidence.claim: Original challenge solved by p0pular.eth on attempt #482 for $47K
$30M raised from Coinbase Ventures; FAI token at $56M market cap
Sovereign Agent Stack with TEEs, zkTLS, Builder Platform on Base
Withstands adversarial prompts without human intervention
